calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-06-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: RICHARD BECKMAN FOR PLAINTIFF AMERICAN HOTELS, INC. WITH BRUCE HENRY, MANAGER
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY PAUL BEHREND FOR DEFENDANT JOEL MALLARI

THIS CAUSE COMES ON REGULARLY FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE THIS DAY. ALL PARTIES ARE PRESENT AS NOTED ABOVE. SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS ARE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT RECITED IN OPEN COURT AND THEY ARE AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT AGREES TO VACATE AND FULLY SURRENDER PREMISES KNOWN AS 735 TAYLOR STREET, ROOM 104, SAN FRANCISCO, CA BY 12:00 NOON , FEBRUARY 14, 2006. IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES, JUDGMENT SHALL BE SET ASIDE AND THE CASE DISMISSED.
PLAINTIFF SHALL BE AWARDED JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES; BACK RENT OF $500.00 AND PER DIEM DAMAGES OF $26.66 FROM DECEMBER 13, 2005 UNTIL ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, LESS ANY SUMS TENDERED BY DEFENDANT. EACH SIDE SHALL BEAR OWN COURT COSTS AND ATTORNEY'S FEES.
SHOULD DEFENDANT TIMELY VACATES THE PREMISES, PLAINTIFF SHALL WAIVE ALL UNPAID RENTS AND UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES AND SHALL APPLY EX PARTE FOR AN ORDER SETTING ASIDE JUDGMENT AND DISMISSING THE CASE WITH PREJUDICE. THERE SHALL BE A STAY OF EXECUTION OF THE JUDGMENT UNTIL FEBRUARY 15, 2006.
DEFENDANT SHALL SURRENDER ALL SETS OF KEYS DIRECTLY TO PLAINTIFF NO LATER THAN 12:00 NOON, FEBRUARY 14, 2006. DEFENDANT TO SIGN THE "SURRENDER" DOCUMENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES HIS RIGHT TO SET ASIDE, APPEAL OR CHALLENGE THE JUDGMENT. PARTIES UNDERSTAND AND CONCUR WITH STIPULATION STATED FOR THE RECORD. DEFENDANT CONFIRMS HIS TRUE LAST NAME TO BE "MALLARI".

JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM CHEN; CLERK CLARK BANAYAD; REPORTER JOANN BRYCE (218)

payments.description: FIRST FILING UD COMPLT LESS THAN 2,500
